title: Semester-End Examination Process for Data Structures & Applications
description: A flowchart illustrating the logical structure and decision-making process a student should follow during a Data Structures and Algorithms exam, from reading a problem to selecting and applying the appropriate data structure.
elements: Identify Key Operations (e.g., Insert, Search, Delete, Sort, Traverse)
Recall Candidate Data Structures (Arrays, Linked Lists, Trees, Graphs, Hash Tables)
relationships: Process flow guiding from problem analysis to solution verification, with a feedback loop for re-evaluation if the selected data structure is deemed inappropriate during implementation.
